docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANDERSON, WANDA J AS TO DEFENDANT IMHETEP TEKH INSTITUTE, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION AL-IRSHAD, YUSUF-ALI , AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO ASSIGNEE LABOR COMMISSIONER, STATE OF CALIFORNIA
